title: CAISO Branch Shadow Prices HASP Hourly JSON API
description:
Constraint pricing in CAISO at each Nomogram and Branch from the hour-ahead scheduling process. 

CAISO uses Nomograms to: “define a constraint relationship between two power system MW variables.”  See section 3.1.7 of the Market+Operations Business Practice Manual for more information on CAISO’s use of Nomograms.
